---
title: "Teaching Evaluations"
---

## Evaluation Trends Over Time

The plots below are generated from evaluation data extracted from the linked PDF summaries. UCLA TA evaluations used a 9-point scale; those values are linearly rescaled to the 5-point UC Davis scale so they can be shown on the same axis.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

rds_path <- "data/evals_data.rds"
if (!file.exists(rds_path)) {
  stop(
    "Evaluation data file not found at: ", rds_path, "\n",
    "Please run the build script to generate it:\n",
    "  ./build.sh\n",
    "Or generate it manually:\n",
    "  Rscript data/build_evals_data.R"
  )
}
evals <- readRDS(rds_path)

evals$role <- ifelse(
  grepl("TA", evals$course, fixed = TRUE),
  "UCLA (TA)",
  "UC Davis (Instructor of Record)"
)

evals_long <- evals %>%
  select(year, role, course, overall_rating, instructor_effectiveness, course_organization) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(overall_rating, instructor_effectiveness, course_organization),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "rating"
  )

evals_long$metric <- factor(
  evals_long$metric,
  levels = c("overall_rating", "instructor_effectiveness", "course_organization"),
  labels = c("Overall rating", "Instructor effectiveness", "Course organization")
)

year_breaks <- sort(unique(evals$year))

ggplot(evals_long, aes(x = year, y = rating, color = metric, shape = role)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(metric, role)), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = year_breaks) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(3.5, 5.0)) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Rating (out of 5)",
    color = "Metric",
    shape = "Role",
    caption = "Data extracted from UC Davis and UCLA teaching evaluation summaries."
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#2780E3", "#28A745", "#E67E22")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical"
  )
```

## UC Davis (Instructor of Record)

### Epi 204

#### 2025

- [Epi 204 Evaluations Summary (2025)](files/evals/evals%20epi%20204%202025%20summary.pdf)

#### 2024

- [Epi 204 Evaluations Summary (2024)](files/evals/Evaluations%20epi%20204%202024%20summary.pdf)

#### 2023

- [Epi 204 Evaluations (Spring 2023)](files/evals/Epi%20204%20Evaluations%20Spring%202023.pdf)

## UCLA (Teaching Assistant)

### Winter 2017

- [Teaching Evaluation 1](files/evals/Morrison%20teaching%20eval%201.pdf)
- [Teaching Evaluation 2](files/evals/Morrison%20teaching%20eval%202.pdf)
